summary: Frontend-only verification of the 'Request Resume' → mailto migration (replacing previous resume download). All 4 entry points (navbar, hero, contact, command palette) correctly trigger a mailto navigation to 0210zeel@gmail.com with subject 'Resume request' (URL-encoded) and a prefilled body. No file downloads, no new tabs, no JS console errors related to portfolio code. Old download testids are gone. Hero subhead text and all major sections render correctly.
tests_executed: Hero subhead now reads 'I help engineering teams ship faster and with more confidence...' — PASS
Old testids absent: 'resume-button', 'hero-download-resume', 'contact-resume', 'command-resume' — PASS (none present in DOM or source)
Navbar [data-testid=request-resume-button] click → mailto:0210zeel@gmail.com?subject=Resume%20request&body=... captured via context request listener — PASS
Hero [data-testid=hero-request-resume] click → same correct mailto URL — PASS
Contact [data-testid=contact-request-resume] click → same correct mailto URL — PASS
Command Palette: opened via [data-testid=open-command-palette] then clicked [data-testid=command-request-resume] → same correct mailto URL — PASS
No new tabs opened (window.open / popup events: 0), no downloads triggered (page.on('download'): 0)

non_blocking_console_warnings.note: Originates from external demo iframe (zeel-hub.github.io/bingMapApplication), not from this portfolio code. Not related to Request Resume feature.

non_blocking_console_warnings.message: React DOM property warning 'class' instead of 'className'
non_blocking_console_warnings.note: External demo code; not from portfolio.
Expected sandboxed-iframe restriction; not from portfolio.

critical_code_review_comments: requestResume is correctly defined once in Navbar.jsx and re-imported by Hero, Contact, and CommandPalette — good DRY.
profile.email is correctly sourced from src/data/portfolio.js (0210zeel@gmail.com).
Subject and body are URL-encoded via encodeURIComponent — correctly produces 'Resume%20request'.
Buttons are <button> elements (not <a>), so they cannot accidentally open a new tab or download — desired behavior.
Minor (non-blocking): portfolio.js still exposes profile.resumeUrl = '/Zeel_Patel_Resume.pdf' which is now unused. Consider removing for cleanliness.
Minor: Hero.jsx line 3 has the import statement merged onto the same line as the lucide-react import — works but is slightly hard to read.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Verified iteration-5 requirement: all 4 'Request Resume' triggers fire a mailto: to 0210zeel@gmail.com with subject 'Resume request' and a prefilled body, with no downloads, no new tabs, no console errors from portfolio code. Old resume-download testids are fully removed. Interception technique that worked: page.context.on('request') captures mailto: navigation requests in Chromium (overriding window.location.href via Object.defineProperty FAILS because Location.prototype.href is non-configurable — patch reported 'not configurable'). Use the request listener for any future mailto/external-scheme verification.
